parents.subject: LU-19545 ec: tight binding parity mirror to data mirror

commit.subject: LU-19763 lnet: fix buffer assignment in lnet_sock_setbuf
commit.message:
LU-19763 lnet: fix buffer assignment in lnet_sock_setbuf

When setting tx/rx buffer sizes via lnet_sock_setbuf(), `rxbufsize`
was incorrectly assigned to `sk->sk_sndbuf`, causing both send and
receive buffers to behave unexpectedly.

Fixes: 99d9638d6c ("LU-13783 libcfs: support removal of kernel_setsockopt()")
Signed-off-by: Xinxia Qu <xqu@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I7e7af3c68fb883efb7751d794997e4c9519a0ae3
